message:
Running command: 
# SYNTHESIS COMPLETED! Now running STA pre-PnR (step 83)!
# ABC finished, Yosys finished. New netlist generated.
# STA is running for the max_ss_100C_1v60 corner.
# 
# The full flow is continuing from synthesis:
# 77-synth → 78-header → 79-checks → 80-checks → 81-checkSDC → 82-checkMacro → 83-STA
# 
# After STA: Floorplan, Placement, CTS, Routing...
# This is a fresh complete PnR run based on the updated synthesis!
# 
# Monitor the flow progress.

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 1000); do
    sleep 60
    PROCS=$(ps aux | grep -E "(librelane|yosys|openroad|abc|magic|netgen)" | grep -v grep | wc -l)
    LOG_BYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/librelane_synth2.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATEST=$(tail -3 /tmp/librelane_synth2.log 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^$" | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-100)
    STEP=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -1)
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] LOG=${LOG_BYTES}B PROCS=$PROCS STEP=$STEP FINAL=$FINAL | $LATEST"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
    [ "$PROCS" = "0" ] && echo "All processes done!" && break
done
